action.reasoning: Observation: iter 28 mlp_fine_tune crashed due to device mismatch (CPU weight vs CUDA input). Best score remains 0.304 from Ridge linear model. Analysis: linear model captures most signal; residual non-linearity may be small but could boost R². With ~10.6 min remaining and 2 iterations left, a quick residual MLP (trained on 2M subsample) is feasible and could improve. Decision: write mlp_residual.py to train a small MLP on linear-model residuals, evaluate on validation sub-sample, save if validation R² improves over linear baseline. Update predict.py to support linear+residual ensemble. Submit eval immediately (dummy checkpoint) to measure test performance regardless of improvement; if not improved, linear-only will be used as fallback.
